Class AdminRequest

java.lang.Object
model.AdminRequest
public class AdminRequest extends Object
Represents a request from instructors to admins for admin-specific actions. Enhanced with category support and notification tracking.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    AdminRequest.Category
    Request categories available to users
